documentation.description: This package contains the routine used for Character'Wide_[Wide_]Width

subprograms.name: Wide_Wide_Width_Character
subprograms.code: function Wide_Wide_Width_Character (Lo, Hi : Character) return Natural

documentation.description:
Compute Wide_Wide_Width attribute for non-static type derived from
Character. The arguments are the low and high bounds for the type.

subprograms.name: Wide_Width_Character
subprograms.code: function Wide_Width_Character (Lo, Hi : Character) return Natural

documentation.description:
Compute Wide_Width attribute for non-static type derived from
Character. The arguments are the low and high bounds for the type.
